assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: businesses investing across Meta and Google Ads that need one coherent diagnostic view

creative_strategy.audience_insight: Platform reports may describe the same customer journey differently because their definitions and windows differ.
creative_strategy.message_angle: The audit compares platforms without pretending their numbers are automatically identical.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: Two optical lenses viewing one object from different angles will explain reconciliation better than merged dashboards.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: one central business-outcome object observed through two distinct unbranded optical lenses
visual_direction.action: the lenses project different partial views that align only at a shared definition plane
visual_direction.environment: a dark precision optics studio with tactile glass and measurement grids without numbers
visual_direction.composition: outcome object center, lenses left and right, definition plane behind, copy above
visual_direction.lighting: lime central object, cyan left lens, violet right lens, crisp white alignment plane
visual_direction.style: high-end scientific editorial still life with clear conceptual logic

copy.caption: Meta and Google can report the customer journey through different lenses. A cross-platform audit compares definitions, tracking, creative, budget, and landing experience.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is one central business-outcome object observed through two distinct unbranded optical lenses. Show the lenses project different partial views that align only at a shared definition plane. Set the scene in a dark precision optics studio with tactile glass and measurement grids without numbers. Composition: outcome object center, lenses left and right, definition plane behind, copy above. Lighting: lime central object, cyan left lens, violet right lens, crisp white alignment plane. Visual style: high-end scientific editorial still life with clear conceptual logic. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'The audit compares platforms without pretending their numbers are automatically identical.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'Two platforms. One business question.', support line '$325 Meta + Google Ads Audit', and CTA 'Audit Meta + Google together' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid platform logos, identical-number claims, attribution winner labels or microscope imagery, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
platform logos, identical-number claims, attribution winner labels or microscope imagery

accessibility.alt_text: Two lenses view one business-outcome object and align at a shared definition plane.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Verify the $325 price and cross-platform scope against the live Zenta website.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
